commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Human review is needed for built-in provider scope and security/resource-boundary acceptance; no narrow automated repair remains.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain bug was found; the security-sensitive XAPI, secret redaction, no-password-argv, HTTPS, and metadata-gated cleanup paths need maintainer boundary acceptance. (sha=6b9ec0daa9923352696ce7049318a702aa299a63)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a direct Linux-only XCP-ng SSH-lease provider with config/env/flag plumbing, XAPI lifecycle and cleanup code, docs, tests, a guarded live-smoke script, and small adjacent CLI/worker hardening fixes.

Reproducibility: not applicable. for a feature PR; the relevant check is the contributor’s live XCP-ng proof plus source review of the new lifecycle path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review is needed for built-in provider scope and security/resource-boundary acceptance; no narrow automated repair remains.

target.title: feat(provider): add XCP-ng provider
target.body:
## Summary

- Add an XCP-ng provider with VM clone, config-drive, SSH readiness, stop/release, cleanup, and doctor support.
- Add XCP-ng configuration parsing, provider registration, docs, command help references, and changelog coverage.
- Add focused tests for provider config, lifecycle behavior, Xen API client handling, redaction, cloud-init/config-drive content, and cleanup edge cases.

## Related

- Addresses https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/issues/217
- Follows up on https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/issues/217#issuecomment-4637370969

## Verification

- `go test -race ./...`

## Notes

- Live XCP-ng smoke coverage is exposed through `scripts/xcpng-live-smoke.sh` and requires local XCP-ng configuration/credentials.
target.author: coygeek

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
